allow: Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}\\n" -X POST http://localhost:18090/api/ask -H "Authorization: Bearer wrong" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"question":"test"}')
Bash(curl -s -w "\\n%{http_code}\\n" -X POST http://localhost:18090/api/ask -H "Authorization: Bearer test-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"question":"test"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:18090/api/ask -H 'Authorization: Bearer test-token' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"question":"who has the best headshot percentage","players":[{"name":"TestPlayer","tag":"NA1","region":"na"}]}')
